---
title: "Blog"
body-classes: text-page blog-page
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: 
    items: 10
    title: "Emily Miller's Blog"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, date, file-modified]
  exclude:
    draft: true
  categories: false
  grid-columns: 3
  grid-item-border: false
---

::: page-intro
Notes, project writeups, course pieces, and the occasional record of whatever I have been trying to understand lately.
:::
